results.title: GetMint: Details, Reviews, Pricing, & Features
results.content:
GetMint has no publicly accessible user reviews across major platforms. Research of G2, Capterra, TrustRadius, Product Hunt, Reddit, and Twitter/X revealed no substantive customer feedback, ratings, or testimonials. This absence is notable for a company claiming 200+ customers.

Several factors could explain it. The company launched in 2025 and may lack time to accumulate review critical mass. Enterprise B2B customers typically provide feedback through private channels rather than public platforms. The specialized GEO market serves a narrow customer set that hasn't generated sufficient review volume.

Observable Facts: [...] ## GetMint Company Overview

GetMintlaunched in 2025 from Paris with three co-founders: Joan Burkovic, Matthieu Poitrimolt, and Emmanuel Costa. The company addresses a fundamental shift in how consumers discover brands—when potential customers ask AI assistants for recommendations, brands that don't appear in those responses lose revenue to competitors who do.

The problem is urgent. With 1.6 billion monthly users of AI search globally and 50% of consumers now relying on AI for purchasing decisions, traditional SEO strategies don't translate to this new landscape. Brands lack effective tools to monitor their presence in LLM-generated responses or understand which content gaps prevent AI discoverability. [...] Observable Facts:

   A G2 product listing exists but contains no accessible reviews
   No Capterra product page was identified
   No Reddit discussions or Twitter conversations about user experiences
   No verified case studies or customer testimonials are publicly available

This creates validation risk for potential buyers. Without third-party verification of product-market fit or customer satisfaction, companies evaluating GetMint should request customer references and detailed case studies directly from the vendor.

Learn more about GetMint reviews
## GetMint Pricing

GetMint operates a subscription SaaS model with monthly and annual billing. Annual subscribers receive a consistent 20% discount across all tiers.

(Software Development):  (Redwood City, California) [...] Helping brands monitor, optimize, and grow their visibility in AI search. AI is becoming the new entry point for product discovery, with 1.7B+ people using AI assistants every month. This shift impacts how consumers and businesses choose brands — often before they ever reach your website. GetMint is the first platform built to help brands understand and improve their presence in AI search: Monitor — Track how often AI models (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, etc.) mention your brand vs competitors, analyze tone, sentiment, and alignment with your positioning. Diagnose — See which sources and prompts shape AI answers in your category, detect visibility gaps, and spot misaligned narratives. Act — Refresh existing content, create AI-ready articles with your brand voice, and publish
